Localization.Description: A connection is allowed, or denied, or closed, or terminated

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: A connection from host {src.host} to host {dst.host} is denied on host {event_src.host}
A connection from host {src.host} to host {dst.host} is allowed on host {event_src.host}
A connection from host {src.host} to host {dst.host} is closed on host {event_src.host}
A connection from host {src.host} to host {dst.host} is terminated on host {event_src.host}
